title: New Employee IT Onboarding
summary: End-to-end process for setting up IT access for new starters.
purpose: Ensure every new employee has the correct IT access, hardware, and software on their first day, with no steps missed.
scope: All new permanent and contract employees across all Circle Gas markets.

roles.responsibility: Approves access requests and assigns equipment.
Executes account creation and device setup.
Raises the onboarding request at least 5 working days before start date.

steps.title: Receive onboarding request from HR
steps.description: HR submits a completed New Starter Request form (SharePoint) including: full name, job title, department, manager, start date, market, and required software.
steps.notes: Must be submitted ≥5 working days before start date.

steps.title: Create Active Directory account
steps.description: Create the user account in Active Directory following the naming convention: firstname.lastname@circlegas.com. Set a temporary password and force reset on first login.
steps.notes: Username must be unique — check for existing accounts with same name before creating.
checklist: AD account created with correct naming convention
Force password reset on first login enabled

steps.title: Assign Microsoft 365 licence
steps.description: In the Microsoft 365 Admin Centre, assign the appropriate licence tier (Business Standard or E3) based on the employee's role as specified in the onboarding form.
steps.notes: Check current licence availability before assigning. Escalate to IT Manager if stock is low.
checklist: Licence assigned in M365 Admin Centre

steps.title: Add to relevant security groups and distribution lists
steps.description: Add the user to department security groups, shared mailboxes, and Teams channels as directed by the manager. Reference the Department Access Matrix (SharePoint).
steps.notes: Do not add to groups beyond what is specified — follow least-privilege principle.

steps.title: Prepare and configure laptop
steps.description: Image and configure a laptop following SOP003. Apply company MDM policy, install standard software bundle, and label the asset.
steps.notes: Cross-reference SOP003 (Laptop Build & Configuration) for full imaging steps.
checklist: Laptop imaged with latest approved build
Asset tagged and recorded in asset register

steps.title: Send welcome email to new employee
steps.description: Send the standard IT Welcome Email template (found in SharePoint > IT Templates) to the employee's personal email (pre-start) and their new work email. Include login credentials, IT support contact, and first-day instructions.
steps.notes: Never send temporary passwords in plain text — use the secure password link from IT Glue.
checklist: Welcome email sent to personal email before start date

steps.title: Confirm setup on Day 1
steps.description: Check in with the new employee on their first day to confirm they can log in, access email and Teams, and that the laptop is working correctly. Resolve any blockers immediately.
steps.notes: Log any issues in the helpdesk system against the onboarding ticket.

references: IT Welcome Email Template (SharePoint > IT Templates)

changeHistory.author: IT Manager
changeHistory.notes: Updated licence assignment steps for M365 E3 rollout.
